meta.reconstruction_note: Outcome computed retrospectively using Hyperliquid candleSnapshot 15m data. Price data sentinel value 0.0 means unavailable — see historical_materiality note.
meta.price_data_note: HYPE price data from Hyperliquid candleSnapshot 15m was unavailable for 2026-05-25. All price fields use 0.0 as an unavailable-data sentinel, not a real value.

historical_materiality.note: HYPE price data from Hyperliquid candleSnapshot for 2026-05-25 was not available. Historical volatility baseline for HYPE not established. Materiality cannot be assessed. All sentinel 0.0 values indicate unavailable data.

event_time_uncertainty.note: Only broadcast_time is known. The actual whale position change may have occurred hours before the broadcast. Estimated uncertainty is conservatively set to 1 hour.
